description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named test-p4c-debian that runs on every push to main, on pull requests to main, and on merge groups to main. The workflow has two jobs: test-ubuntu22 and test-ubuntu22-tofino, both running on ubuntu-22.04. The test-ubuntu22 job uses a matrix strategy to test with different combinations of Unity and GTest, while the test-ubuntu22-tofino job tests the Tofino backend. Both jobs check out the repository, use ccache, build with GCC, and run tests.
